title: Her Husband's Secretary
writer: Crane Wilbur, Lillie Hayward, Anthony Coldeway
actors: Jean Muir, Beverly Roberts, Warren Hull
plot: Carol likes her boss, but does not get involved with him as so many other secretaries would. She instead falls for a poor riveter and leaves to be married. She soon finds that the poor riveter is the son of Dan Kingdon and is load...
